input_name: Skin Aqua Super Moisture UV Gel
english_name: Skin Aqua Super Moisture UV Gel
japanese_name: スキンアクア スーパーモイスチャーUVジェル
description: Skin Aqua UV gel. Lightweight SPF50+ sunscreen that disappears fast; the konbini-to-theme-park face shield for humid Japan days.

japanese_name: スノーピーク チタン先割れスプーン
description: Snow Peak titanium spork. Featherlight camping spoon-fork from Niigata outdoor nerd heaven. The tiny souvenir that makes airplane meals feel slightly less tragic.

japanese_name: ソフトサンティア
description: Soft Santear contact lens drops. Artificial tears for dry contacts after trains, screens, and hotel aircon. Small bottle, big relief energy.

japanese_name: スフレ・プリン
description: FamilyMart souffle pudding. Custard pudding with a soft cheese souffle hat. Konbini dessert engineering for people who cannot choose one texture.

japanese_name: 吸盤スポンジホルダー
description: Daiso suction sponge holder. Sticks to the sink wall and gets the sad wet sponge off the counter. Tiny kitchen upgrade, very 100-yen-core.

english_name: Aimedia Portable Clothing Stain Remover Pen
japanese_name: 衣類のシミ取りペン 携帯用
description: Stain remover pen. Emergency spot-cleaning for ramen splash damage. Keep one in your bag before white shirts meet convenience-store curry.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: Drycare stain remover pen, Aimedia portable clothing stain remover pen, Shimitori clothing stain remover pen]

japanese_name: スタロジー エディターズシリーズ 365デイズノート
description: Stalogy 365 Days Notebook. Thin-grid notebook with 368 pages and zero planner drama. Good for travel logs, content shot lists, and pretending life has structure.

japanese_name: 立つしゃもじ
description: Standing rice paddle. It stands upright instead of getting rice glue all over the counter. Small Japanese kitchen logic, major why-didn't-I-own-this energy.

japanese_name: めぐりズム 蒸気でグッドナイト 首もとあったかシート
description: MegRhythm neck steam patch. Warm, disposable neck comfort for airplane stiffness and hotel-pillow betrayal. Japan really saw shoulder tension and made it cute.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: MegRhythm Good-Night Steam Patch, MegRhythm steam neck sheet, discontinued shoulder/neck heat patch]

english_name: FamilyMart Strawberry and Whipped Cream Sandwich
japanese_name: いちご＆ホイップサンド
description: Strawberry fruit sando. Whipped cream and strawberries in soft white bread, sold like dessert pretending to be lunch. Konbini picnic food with main-character behavior.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: FamilyMart strawberry and whipped cream sandwich, Lawson strawberry fruit sandwich, 7-Eleven strawberry sandwich]

japanese_name: ベビーカーフック
description: Daiso stroller hooks. Clip-on bag hangers for strollers, tiny but clutch when the diaper bag starts winning. Parenting convenience, ¥100 edition.

japanese_name: サントリー -196 ストロングゼロ
description: Strong Zero chu-hi. 9% ABV, cheap, fizzy, and famously disrespectful to your evening plans. Lemon and grapefruit are the konbini classics.
notes: Official Suntory page fetched in search results, but direct page rendering failed; no reliable image source found

input_name: Strong Zero / hangover cure aisle items
english_name: House Ukon no Chikara Turmeric Drink
japanese_name: ハウス ウコンの力
description: Ukon no Chikara. Tiny turmeric drink parked near the alcohol-regret shelf. Konbini pregame logic in a 100 ml bottle.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Strong Zero, Ukon no Chikara, Hepalyse W, liver-support drinks]

japanese_name: サントリー -196 ストロングゼロ ダブルレモン
description: Strong Zero Double Lemon. 9% lemon chu-hi that tastes friendly until it files paperwork against your plans. The classic cheap can after a long konbini run.
notes: Official Suntory page fetched in search results, but direct page rendering failed; no reliable image source found

japanese_name: 皇漢堂 ビューラックA
description: Beauluck A. Strong bisacodyl laxative for serious constipation, not casual snack-tourism tummy drama. Drugstore shelf with real consequences.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Beauluck A, Dulcolax, Kenei Magnesium Oxide E]

japanese_name: どんぐり共和国 となりのトトロ ぬいぐるみ 大トトロ M
description: Donguri Republic Totoro plush. Official Ghibli merch that turns adults into plush-hoarding goblins. The safe bet when you cannot fit a whole Catbus in luggage.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Totoro plush, Jiji goods, Calcifer keychain, Ghibli stationery]

japanese_name: サンキラー パーフェクトストロングプラス
description: Sunkiller Perfect Strong Plus. Japanese waterproof sunscreen built for sweaty sightseeing and beach-day denial. Grab the newer Strong-Z if this label is gone.

japanese_name: サントリー 山崎蒸溜所 / 白州蒸溜所 見学ツアー
description: Suntory distillery tour. Whisky pilgrimage with tastings, stills, and reservation anxiety. Book early or enjoy staring at the website like it owes you money.
notes: [VENUE_CATEGORY: Suntory distillery tours; Yamazaki Distillery, Hakushu Distillery, tasting lounge]

english_name: Japanese Suribachi Mortar and Pestle Set
japanese_name: すり鉢とすりこぎ
description: Suribachi mortar. Ridged Japanese mortar that turns sesame into goma-ae sauce without pulverizing your spirit. Kitchen souvenir for people with luggage optimism.

japanese_name: 築地 寿司作り体験
description: Tsukiji sushi making class. You make nigiri, realize chefs are not overpaid, then eat the evidence. Good rainy-day Tokyo plan with actual payoff.
notes: [VENUE_CATEGORY: Tsukiji/Tokyo; Tsukiji Cooking, Japan Wonder Travel sushi workshop, byFood Tsukiji sushi class] No reliable image source found

japanese_name: 鶴屋吉信 季節の生菓子
description: Tsuruya Yoshinobu wagashi. Elegant Japanese sweets for people who want dessert to look like it has a trust fund. Buy same-day; these do not travel like KitKats.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Suzukake wagashi, Tsuruya Yoshinobu Yu-mochi, seasonal namagashi]

japanese_name: TOTO ウォシュレット
description: TOTO Washlet. Heated seat, bidet wand, button panel from the future. Admire it in hotels; do not casually stuff one into a suitcase.

japanese_name: 足袋下
description: Tabi socks. Split-toe socks that make sandals, geta, and your toes feel weirdly organized. Buy the nice ones outside Daiso; your feet know.

japanese_name: タミヤ プラモデル
description: Tamiya plastic model kit. Tiny cars, tanks, and planes for people who say 'quick hobby stop' and leave two hours later. Akihabara danger aisle.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Tamiya Mini 4WD, 1/24 Nissan Skyline GT-R V-spec R34, scale aircraft kits] No reliable image source found

japanese_name: 茶席の生菓子
description: Tea ceremony namagashi. Seasonal wagashi served with matcha, soft enough to feel expensive and fragile. Eat it same day; the shelf life is basically a sneeze.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: seasonal namagashi, nerikiri, kinton, yomogi mochi]
